description: A security vulnerability has been detected in D-Link DI-7001 MINI 24.04.18B1. The affected element is an unknown function of the file /dbsrv.asp. Such manipulation of the argument str leads to buffer overflow. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.
